subject: Cod and haddock prices, week 40
snippet: Craig - cod holding at 580 ISK/kg gutted, haddock up to 410...
body:
Craig,

Prices for the week: cod holding at 580 ISK/kg gutted, haddock up to 410, redfish steady at 295. Demand from the Grimsby buyers is firm into November.

If you land Friday I can take the full cod allocation. Let me know the estimate.

Kevin
Vestfirsk Fiskur

subject: Re: Cod and haddock prices, week 40
snippet: Planning a five-day run from the 1st. Should land Friday the 2nd...
body:
Kevin,

Planning a five-day run from the 1st, weather holding. Should land Friday the 2nd, late afternoon. Estimate 18 tonnes cod, 6 haddock, a little redfish.

Hold the cod allocation. I will confirm by VHF on the approach.

Craig

subject: Re: Cod and haddock prices, week 40
snippet: Good. Lets lock a forward on redfish for the December gap...
body:
Craig,

Good. One more thing - lets lock a forward on redfish to cover the December refit gap. I can offer 300 ISK/kg on 10 tonnes delivered before the haulout.

We can settle it at the quarterly catch-up. Smithwicks on me.

Kevin

subject: Re: Cod and haddock prices, week 40
snippet: 300 works. Pencil the catch-up for the week of the 12th...
body:
Kevin,

300 works on the 10 tonnes. Pencil the quarterly catch-up for the week of the 12th, before I head to Reykjavik for the conference.

Craig

subject: Quarterly safety equipment check - Sjonarhorn
snippet: Craig - your quarterly safety check is due. Life rafts, EPIRB battery...
body:
Craig,

Your quarterly safety equipment check is due before the autumn campaign closes. Life rafts, EPIRB battery, immersion suits. I can slot you Monday the 28th at the berth.

Also need to confirm the haulout berth for the December refit.

Colleen
Isafjordur Harbour Office

subject: Re: Quarterly safety equipment check - Sjonarhorn
snippet: Monday the 28th works. Haulout is December 7, three-week window...
body:
Colleen,

Monday the 28th works, I will be ashore. Haulout is December 7 for the engine refit, three-week window, target back in the water the 26th. Can you reserve the shipyard berth from the 7th?

Craig

subject: Re: Quarterly safety equipment check - Sjonarhorn
snippet: Berth reserved December 7 to 28. Inspection confirmed Monday 09:00...
body:
Craig,

Berth reserved December 7 to 28, plenty of margin. Safety inspection confirmed Monday 09:00 at your berth. Bring the immersion suit log.

Colleen

subject: Engine overhaul quote - FV Sjonarhorn
snippet: Craig - quote attached for the main engine overhaul, 4,500,000 ISK...
body:
Craig,

Quote for the main engine overhaul on the Sjonarhorn: 4,500,000 ISK all in - labour, gaskets, injectors, cooling, sea trials. Haulout slot December 7, completion targeted December 26.

We would need the deposit to order the injector set from the supplier in good time.

Magnus
Nordurverksmidja, Akureyri

subject: Re: Engine overhaul quote - FV Sjonarhorn
snippet: Accepted. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing...
body:
Magnus,

Accepted at 4,500,000. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing. Confirm the December 7 to 26 window and send the deposit invoice - I will settle through Islandsbanki this week.

Order the injector set.

Craig

subject: Re: Engine overhaul quote - FV Sjonarhorn
snippet: Injector set ordered, shipping to Akureyri. Deposit invoice attached...
body:
Craig,

Injector set ordered, shipping to us in Akureyri via FedEx, ETA early November. Deposit invoice attached. We are holding the December 7 slot.

Magnus

subject: Fisheries Conference, Reykjavik, October 16
snippet: Registration open for the autumn conference - quota and sustainability panels...
body:
Captain ONeill,

Registration is open for the autumn Fisheries Conference in Reykjavik on October 16. Panels on quota management and bycatch reduction, plus the electronic monitoring pilot review. Overnight delegate rate held at the Grand.

Regards,
Icelandic Fisheries Association

subject: Re: Fisheries Conference, Reykjavik, October 16
snippet: Register me as a delegate, one overnight on the 16th...
body:
Register me as a delegate for the 16th, one overnight. I am on the quota panel discussion and want the monitoring pilot session.

Craig ONeill, FV Sjonarhorn

subject: Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot - autumn update
snippet: Bycatch reduction figures from the pilot fleet are in...
body:
Captain ONeill,

Autumn update on the Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot: bycatch reduction across the pilot fleet is tracking to target. Your camera install from the August window is reporting clean. Full review at the conference.

Icelandic Fisheries Association

subject: Autumn cod stock assessment - Westfjords grounds
snippet: The autumn assessment for the Westfjords cod grounds is published...
body:
Captain ONeill,

The autumn cod stock assessment for the Westfjords grounds is published. Biomass north of the fjord is stable on last year; recommend continued spreading of effort across the quota to protect the spawning aggregation.

Liam asked me to flag it to you directly.

Marine Research Institute

subject: Re: Autumn cod stock assessment - Westfjords grounds
snippet: Thanks. Lines up with what we are seeing on the sonar...
body:
Thanks - lines up with what we are seeing on the sonar north of the fjord. I will keep the effort spread and hold some cod quota into November.

Good of Liam to flag it.

Craig

subject: Placement dates and term fee
snippet: Hi Dad - placement is confirmed at Akureyri hospital for November...
body:
Hi Dad,

Placement is confirmed at Akureyri hospital for November, so I will be on the ward most of the month. Term fee is due the 5th - sending the invoice. Still home for Mum's birthday on the 14th.

Love,
Maeve

subject: Re: Placement dates and term fee
snippet: Sent the term fee through this morning. Proud of you...
body:
Maeve,

Sent the term fee through this morning, and a bit extra for the winter coat. Proud of you on the placement.

See you the 14th for your mother's birthday, and the weekend of the 24th if you can swing it.

Dad

subject: Appointment reminder - November 18
snippet: Reminder: annual checkup with Dr. Walsh, November 18 at 10:00...
body:
Mr. ONeill,

Reminder of your annual checkup with Dr. Brendan Walsh on November 18 at 10:00. Please fast from midnight for bloods. Reply to reschedule.

Isafjordur Health Clinic

subject: Your September statement is ready
snippet: Your Islandsbanki statement for September is available...
body:
Your Islandsbanki account statement for September is now available in the app. No action required.

This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

Islandsbanki

subject: Vessel policy renewal - FV Sjonarhorn
snippet: Your hull and P&I cover renews November 1. Premium quote attached...
body:
Captain ONeill,

Your hull and P&I cover on the FV Sjonarhorn renews November 1. Premium held close to last year given the clean claims record. Quote attached. Note the December haulout under the lay-up clause may reduce the in-water period premium.

VIS Insurance

subject: Re: Vessel policy renewal - FV Sjonarhorn
snippet: Renew it. Apply the lay-up clause for the December refit window...
body:
Renew it. Apply the lay-up clause for the December 7 to 26 refit window - she will be hauled out at the Isafjordur shipyard.

Craig ONeill

subject: Membership renewal - Fishing Vessel Owners Association
snippet: Your annual FVOA membership is due for renewal...
body:
Captain ONeill,

Your annual Fishing Vessel Owners Association membership is due for renewal. Includes the electronic monitoring pilot programme and the owners insurance pool. Renew via the link or by bank transfer.

FVOA

subject: Re: Membership renewal - Fishing Vessel Owners Association
snippet: Renewed by transfer this morning. Keep me on the pilot list...
body:
Renewed by transfer this morning. Keep me on the monitoring pilot list for the autumn review.

Craig ONeill, FV Sjonarhorn

subject: Bulk deck gear - captains discount this week only
snippet: Exclusive wholesale pricing on trawl doors, netting and deck hardware...
body:
Dear Captain,

Exclusive wholesale pricing on trawl doors, netting, and deck hardware - this week only. Reply BULK for our full catalogue and a captains discount code.

NorthGear Wholesale

subject: Cod and haddock prices, week 41
snippet: Craig - cod up to 590 ISK/kg gutted, haddock 415, redfish steady at 295. Grimsby...
body: Craig - cod up to 590 ISK/kg gutted, haddock 415, redfish steady at 295. Grimsby demand firm. If you land Friday I take the full cod allocation. Send the estimate.

subject: Re: Cod and haddock prices, week 41
snippet: Kevin - planning a five-day run from the 1st, weather permitting. Estimate 7,000...
body: Kevin - planning a five-day run from the 1st, weather permitting. Estimate 7,000 kg cod, 2,500 haddock. Will confirm landing window by VHF on approach.

subject: Berth 4 inspection window
snippet: Craig - safety inspection due before the December haulout. I can slot you Monday...
body: Craig - safety inspection due before the December haulout. I can slot you Monday the 30th, 09:00. Confirm and I'll hold the berth.

subject: Re: Berth 4 inspection window
snippet: Colleen - Monday 09:00 works. Life rafts and EPIRB battery are current, immersio...
body: Colleen - Monday 09:00 works. Life rafts and EPIRB battery are current, immersion suits checked last quarter. See you at the office.

subject: Crew rota for the autumn run
snippet: Patrick - lining up the next voyage. You, Gunnar, and Bjorn on deck, junior rota...
body: Patrick - lining up the next voyage. You, Gunnar, and Bjorn on deck, junior rotating in. Provisions loading Wednesday afternoon on the tide. That work?

subject: Engine refit quote - main bearing overhaul
snippet: Craig - revised quote for the December overhaul: main bearing set, injector serv...
body: Craig - revised quote for the December overhaul: main bearing set, injector service, and cooling. 4,500,000 ISK all in, three-week window from the 7th. Deposit holds the slot.

subject: Re: Engine refit quote - main bearing overhaul
snippet: Nordurverksmidja - approved. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing. Haul...
body: Nordurverksmidja - approved. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing. Haulout the 7th, target completion the 26th with sea trials. Send the deposit invoice.

subject: Autumn cod stock assessment published
snippet: Craig - the Westfjords cod assessment is out. Biomass holding, recruitment sligh...
body: Craig - the Westfjords cod assessment is out. Biomass holding, recruitment slightly up on last year. Attaching the summary for your quota planning. - Liam

subject: Fisheries Conference - final agenda
snippet: Delegates - the October 16 agenda is confirmed: quota management panel at 10:00,...
body: Delegates - the October 16 agenda is confirmed: quota management panel at 10:00, sustainability session after lunch, evening reception at the Grand Hotel. - Fishing Vessel Owners' Association

subject: Museum board ran long
snippet: Home by seven? Lamb's in. Can you grab bread on the way. - Shannon
body: Home by seven? Lamb's in. Can you grab bread on the way. - Shannon

subject: November checkup reminder
snippet: Mr O'Neill - your annual checkup with Dr Walsh is booked for November 18, 10:00....
body: Mr O'Neill - your annual checkup with Dr Walsh is booked for November 18, 10:00. Please keep the food log Dr Walsh requested. - Isafjordur Health Clinic

snippet: Your Islandsbanki Visa statement is available. Balance paid in full by direct de...
body: Your Islandsbanki Visa statement is available. Balance paid in full by direct debit on the 1st. No action needed.

subject: Quota utilisation - Q3 filing
snippet: Craig - reminder that Q3 catch reporting and quota utilisation documentation is ...
body: Craig - reminder that Q3 catch reporting and quota utilisation documentation is due. The electronic monitoring pilot data export is attached for your review before submission.

subject: Coming home the 24th
snippet: Dad - I'll be in from Akureyri the weekend of the 24th. Can you collect me from ...
body: Dad - I'll be in from Akureyri the weekend of the 24th. Can you collect me from the bus? Excited for lamb stew. - Maeve

subject: Christmas Eve plans
snippet: Craig - down from Reykjavik the 24th. Bringing the whiskey. Liam and Erin drivin...
body: Craig - down from Reykjavik the 24th. Bringing the whiskey. Liam and Erin driving up too. Tell Mam I'll fix her radiator while I'm there. - Declan

subject: Harbour coffee weather note
snippet: North band of ice easing by Thursday, wind backing westerly. Good window for the...
body: North band of ice easing by Thursday, wind backing westerly. Good window for the weekend if you want it. Coffee at the hut at six. - Sean

subject: Marine Research Institute - monitoring pilot
snippet: Craig - the Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot needs your August install sig...
body: Craig - the Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot needs your August install signed off before the next data cycle. Form attached. - Marine Research Institute

subject: Insurance renewal - Sjonarhorn
snippet: Craig - annual vessel insurance renews December 1. Premium held at last year's r...
body: Craig - annual vessel insurance renews December 1. Premium held at last year's rate given the clean record. DocuSign link to follow. - Marine Underwriters

subject: Provisions order for the run
snippet: Patrick - fuel topped, ice booked, bait ordered. Add another two crates of provi...
body: Patrick - fuel topped, ice booked, bait ordered. Add another two crates of provisions for a seven-day contingency. Load Wednesday. - Craig

subject: Forward contract - November cod
snippet: Craig - want to lock November cod at 585 ISK/kg on a forward for the first three...
body: Craig - want to lock November cod at 585 ISK/kg on a forward for the first three landings? Protects you if the market softens after the conference. - Kevin

body:
Craig - the Westfjords cod assessment is out. Biomass holding, recruitment slightly up on last year. Attaching the summary for your quota planning. - Liam

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Fisheries Conference - final agenda (wk 44)
snippet: Delegates - the October 16 agenda is confirmed: quota management panel at 10:00,...
body:
Delegates - the October 16 agenda is confirmed: quota management panel at 10:00, sustainability session after lunch, evening reception at the Grand Hotel. - Fishing Vessel Owners' Association

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Coming home the 24th (wk 44)
snippet: Dad - I'll be in from Akureyri the weekend of the 24th. Can you collect me from ...
body:

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Christmas Eve plans (wk 44)
snippet: Craig - down from Reykjavik the 24th. Bringing the whiskey. Liam and Erin drivin...
body:
Craig - down from Reykjavik the 24th. Bringing the whiskey. Liam and Erin driving up too. Tell Mam I'll fix her radiator while I'm there. - Declan

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Harbour coffee weather note (wk 44)
snippet: North band of ice easing by Thursday, wind backing westerly. Good window for the...
body:
North band of ice easing by Thursday, wind backing westerly. Good window for the weekend if you want it. Coffee at the hut at six. - Sean

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Marine Research Institute - monitoring pilot (wk 44)
snippet: Craig - the Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot needs your August install sig...
body:
Craig - the Westfjords electronic monitoring pilot needs your August install signed off before the next data cycle. Form attached. - Marine Research Institute

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Insurance renewal - Sjonarhorn (wk 44)
snippet: Craig - annual vessel insurance renews December 1. Premium held at last year's r...
body:
Craig - annual vessel insurance renews December 1. Premium held at last year's rate given the clean record. DocuSign link to follow. - Marine Underwriters

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Provisions order for the run (wk 44)
snippet: Patrick - fuel topped, ice booked, bait ordered. Add another two crates of provi...
body:
Patrick - fuel topped, ice booked, bait ordered. Add another two crates of provisions for a seven-day contingency. Load Wednesday. - Craig

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Forward contract - November cod (wk 44)
snippet: Craig - want to lock November cod at 585 ISK/kg on a forward for the first three...
body:
Craig - want to lock November cod at 585 ISK/kg on a forward for the first three landings? Protects you if the market softens after the conference. - Kevin

[Follow-up, week 44.]

subject: Cod and haddock prices, week 41 (wk 45)
snippet: Craig - cod up to 590 ISK/kg gutted, haddock 415, redfish steady at 295. Grimsby...
body:
Craig - cod up to 590 ISK/kg gutted, haddock 415, redfish steady at 295. Grimsby demand firm. If you land Friday I take the full cod allocation. Send the estimate.

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Re: Cod and haddock prices, week 41 (wk 45)
snippet: Kevin - planning a five-day run from the 1st, weather permitting. Estimate 7,000...
body:
Kevin - planning a five-day run from the 1st, weather permitting. Estimate 7,000 kg cod, 2,500 haddock. Will confirm landing window by VHF on approach.

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Berth 4 inspection window (wk 45)
snippet: Craig - safety inspection due before the December haulout. I can slot you Monday...
body:
Craig - safety inspection due before the December haulout. I can slot you Monday the 30th, 09:00. Confirm and I'll hold the berth.

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Re: Berth 4 inspection window (wk 45)
snippet: Colleen - Monday 09:00 works. Life rafts and EPIRB battery are current, immersio...
body:
Colleen - Monday 09:00 works. Life rafts and EPIRB battery are current, immersion suits checked last quarter. See you at the office.

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Crew rota for the autumn run (wk 45)
snippet: Patrick - lining up the next voyage. You, Gunnar, and Bjorn on deck, junior rota...
body:
Patrick - lining up the next voyage. You, Gunnar, and Bjorn on deck, junior rotating in. Provisions loading Wednesday afternoon on the tide. That work?

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Engine refit quote - main bearing overhaul (wk 45)
snippet: Craig - revised quote for the December overhaul: main bearing set, injector serv...
body:
Craig - revised quote for the December overhaul: main bearing set, injector service, and cooling. 4,500,000 ISK all in, three-week window from the 7th. Deposit holds the slot.

[Follow-up, week 45.]

subject: Re: Engine refit quote - main bearing overhaul (wk 45)
snippet: Nordurverksmidja - approved. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing. Haul...
body:
Nordurverksmidja - approved. Funding from the vessel reserve, no borrowing. Haulout the 7th, target completion the 26th with sea trials. Send the deposit invoice.
